cards.name: Pain (Animal Path)
cards.subtitle: Summoner

attacks.name: Rhino Charge
attacks.description: An armored rhinoceros bulldozes the field.

cards.flavorText: Come forth, servants of the Rinnegan.

cards.name: Pain (Asura Path)
cards.subtitle: Machine Body

attacks.name: Soul Cannon
attacks.description: A soul-rending beam.

cards.flavorText: Judgment is mechanical.

cards.name: Pain (Deva Path)
cards.subtitle: God of Amegakure

attacks.name: Chibaku Tensei
attacks.description: Compresses the battlefield into a gravity sphere.

ability.name: God's Domain
ability.description: Each time a Pain Path is Benched or played, gain 1 Colorless Chakra.

cards.flavorText: Know pain. Know peace.

cards.name: Pain (Deva Path)
cards.subtitle: God of Amegakure EX

attacks.name: Shinra Tensei
attacks.description: Almighty Push — hurls the target back.

attacks.name: Chibaku Tensei
attacks.description: Compresses the battlefield into a gravity sphere.

ability.name: God's Domain
ability.description: Each time a Pain Path is Benched or played, gain 1 Colorless Chakra.

cards.flavorText: Know pain. Know peace.

cards.name: Pain (Human Path)
cards.subtitle: Soul Reader

attacks.name: Soul Rip
attacks.description: Extracts the soul — lethal to those with weak will.

cards.flavorText: Your mind is mine.

cards.name: Pain (Naraka Path)
cards.subtitle: King of Hell

attacks.name: King of Hell Revive
attacks.description: Heal a Benched Pain Path by 150 HP.

cards.flavorText: All paths lead back to me.

cards.name: Pain (Preta Path)
cards.subtitle: Chakra Absorber

attacks.name: Chakra Drain
attacks.description: Siphons two Chakra from the target.

cards.flavorText: Your jutsu feeds me.

cards.name: Nagato
cards.subtitle: The Original Rinnegan

attacks.name: Outer Path Rebirth
attacks.description: Brings a KO'd Benched Ninja back to play.

ability.name: Six Paths Rinnegan
ability.description: You may play any Pain Path card for free (no Chakra needed).

cards.flavorText: I am the child of prophecy.

cards.name: Nagato
cards.subtitle: The Original Rinnegan EX

attacks.name: Planetary Devastation
attacks.description: Tears rock from the earth to form a moon above the enemy.

attacks.name: Outer Path Rebirth
attacks.description: Brings a KO'd Benched Ninja back to play.

ability.name: Six Paths Rinnegan
ability.description: You may play any Pain Path card for free (no Chakra needed).

cards.flavorText: I am the child of prophecy.

cards.name: Konan
cards.subtitle: Paper User

attacks.name: Paper Flutter
attacks.description: Swarms of origami rain down.

cards.flavorText: Angels do not fall — they rise.

cards.name: Konan
cards.subtitle: Paper God Technique

attacks.name: Paper Person of God
attacks.description: Six hundred billion explosive tags burn the sky.

ability.name: Angel's Wings
ability.description: Retreat cost is 0.

cards.flavorText: This is the miracle Nagato died for.

cards.name: Yahiko
cards.subtitle: Akatsuki's Founder

attacks.name: Unyielding Will
attacks.description: A strike fueled by conviction.

cards.flavorText: A world without war — that was our dream.

cards.name: Itachi Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Prodigy of the Uchiha

attacks.name: Fireball Jutsu
attacks.description: The Uchiha's trademark.

ability.name: Sharingan
ability.description: At the start of your turn, look at the top card of your opponent's deck.

cards.flavorText: Those who abandon their friends are worse than scum.

cards.name: Itachi Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Mangekyo Susanoo

attacks.name: Totsuka Susanoo
attacks.description: The spectral sword Seals its victim.

ability.name: Tsukuyomi
ability.description: Once per turn, Paralyze the Defending Ninja.

cards.flavorText: Forgive me, Sasuke. This is the last time.

cards.name: Itachi Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Crow's Eternal Promise

attacks.name: Perfect Susanoo: Yata Totsuka
attacks.description: Mirror, Sword, and Avatar united.

ability.name: Izanami Bind
ability.description: Once per battle, prevent all damage and Paralyze the attacker.

cards.flavorText: Forgive me, Sasuke. This time — forever.

cards.name: Itachi Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Crow's Eternal Promise EX

attacks.name: Amaterasu Pillars
attacks.description: Black flames rise as walls.

attacks.name: Perfect Susanoo: Yata Totsuka
attacks.description: Mirror, Sword, and Avatar united.

ability.name: Izanami Bind
ability.description: Once per battle, prevent all damage and Paralyze the attacker.

cards.flavorText: Forgive me, Sasuke. This time — forever.

cards.name: Kisame Hoshigaki
cards.subtitle: Monster of the Mist

attacks.name: Chakra Drain
attacks.description: Drains one Chakra from the Defender.

cards.flavorText: Let's see how much blood I can taste today.

cards.name: Kisame Hoshigaki
cards.subtitle: Samehada Fusion

attacks.name: Great Exploding Water Shockwave
attacks.description: Reshapes the battlefield into an ocean.

ability.name: Chakra Siphon
ability.description: When this Ninja takes damage, if you have 0 Chakra attached, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: The tailless tailed beast.

cards.name: Kisame Hoshigaki
cards.subtitle: Samehada Fusion EX

attacks.name: Thousand Feeding Sharks
attacks.description: A tidal school of chakra sharks.

attacks.name: Great Exploding Water Shockwave
attacks.description: Reshapes the battlefield into an ocean.

ability.name: Chakra Siphon
ability.description: When this Ninja takes damage, if you have 0 Chakra attached, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: The tailless tailed beast.

cards.name: Deidara
cards.subtitle: Clay Bomber

attacks.name: C2: Dragon
attacks.description: A flying clay dragon spews fire. Splash damage.

cards.flavorText: Art... is an EXPLOSION!

cards.name: Deidara
cards.subtitle: C4: Karura

attacks.name: C4: Karura
attacks.description: Microscopic explosives consume everything in range. This Ninja takes 60 damage and all Benched opponents take 60.

ability.name: Fleeting Beauty
ability.description: When this Ninja is KO'd, deal 40 damage to the opposing Active Ninja.

cards.flavorText: True art lasts only a moment. Witness it!

cards.name: Sasori
cards.subtitle: Third Kazekage's Killer

attacks.name: Iron Sand
attacks.description: Commands the Third Kazekage's magnetized iron.

cards.flavorText: Everyone is a puppet if you pull the right strings.

cards.name: Sasori
cards.subtitle: Hiruko Puppet Mode

attacks.name: Hidden Weapon Barrage
attacks.description: The hollow shell unloads countless concealed weapons.

ability.name: Puppet Shell
ability.description: Reduce all incoming damage by 20.

cards.flavorText: I cannot be killed. I already died.

cards.name: Sasori
cards.subtitle: Hundred Puppets Master

attacks.name: Chakra Heart Overdrive
attacks.description: Forces his own chakra core to overclock.

ability.name: Eternal Youth
ability.description: When this Ninja would be KO'd, once per game heal 100 HP instead.

cards.flavorText: Art is eternal beauty.

cards.name: Sasori
cards.subtitle: Hundred Puppets Master EX

attacks.name: Performance of a Hundred
attacks.description: Unleashes his army of human puppets in a single devastating dance.

attacks.name: Chakra Heart Overdrive
attacks.description: Forces his own chakra core to overclock.

ability.name: Eternal Youth
ability.description: When this Ninja would be KO'd, once per game heal 100 HP instead.

cards.flavorText: Art is eternal beauty.

cards.name: Hidan
cards.subtitle: Jashinist Immortal

attacks.name: Curse: Blood Bond
attacks.description: Links his pain to his target's.

ability.name: Immortal
ability.description: This Ninja cannot be KO'd by damage — instead, its HP stays at 10 once per battle.

cards.flavorText: Pain is my prayer. Jashin-sama rewards the faithful.

cards.name: Kakuzu
cards.subtitle: Earth Grudge User

attacks.name: Hard Fist
attacks.description: Earth-reinforced punch.

cards.flavorText: Money first. Bodies later.

cards.name: Kakuzu
cards.subtitle: Five Hearts Unleashed

attacks.name: Earth Grudge Fear
attacks.description: All five masks fire in concert.

ability.name: Extra Hearts
ability.description: The first four times this Ninja would be KO'd, instead heal it to 40 HP. (Each use consumes one heart.)

cards.flavorText: My bounty is my purpose.

cards.name: Obito Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Tobi the Masked Man

attacks.name: Intangible Strike
attacks.description: Phases through defenses to strike.

ability.name: Kamui Phase
ability.description: Once per turn, prevent damage from one attack.

cards.flavorText: This reality is broken. I will fix it.

cards.name: Obito Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Ten-Tails Jinchuriki

attacks.name: Ten-Tails Judgment
attacks.description: The Jinchuriki's will devastates the field.

ability.name: Will of the Sage
ability.description: This Ninja cannot be Paralyzed, Poisoned, or Sealed.

cards.flavorText: I will become the god of this broken world.

cards.name: Obito Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Ten-Tails Jinchuriki EX

attacks.name: Truth-Seeking Orbs
attacks.description: Black spheres that erase what they touch.

attacks.name: Ten-Tails Judgment
attacks.description: The Jinchuriki's will devastates the field.

ability.name: Will of the Sage
ability.description: This Ninja cannot be Paralyzed, Poisoned, or Sealed.

cards.flavorText: I will become the god of this broken world.

cards.name: Black Zetsu
cards.subtitle: Will of Kaguya

attacks.name: Manipulate
attacks.description: Bends the target's chakra flow to his design.

ability.name: Millennial Plan
ability.description: When this Ninja is in play, your Otsutsuki-related cards cost 1 less Colorless Chakra.

cards.flavorText: I have waited a thousand years for this moment.

cards.name: White Zetsu
cards.subtitle: Plant Clone

attacks.name: Vine Snare
attacks.description: Chakra vines ensnare the target.

cards.flavorText: I am the mother's child.

cards.name: Kabuto Yakushi
cards.subtitle: Akatsuki Informant

attacks.name: Dead Soul Jutsu
attacks.description: A corpse rises to fight.

cards.flavorText: Knowledge is the only true power.

cards.name: Kabuto Yakushi
cards.subtitle: Akatsuki Sage Apprentice

attacks.name: Edo Tensei Unleash
attacks.description: Resurrects a slain warrior to fight alongside.

ability.name: White Snake Sage
ability.description: This Ninja heals 20 HP at the start of your turn.

cards.flavorText: I am the sum of everyone I have consumed.

cards.name: Hanzo
cards.subtitle: Salamander of the Mist

attacks.name: Summoning: Ibuse
attacks.description: The giant salamander spews poison mist.

ability.name: Poison Sac
ability.description: This Ninja is immune to Poison.

cards.flavorText: Power answers only to power.

cards.name: Akatsuki Edo Tensei
cards.description: Bring back a KO'd Legendary Ninja from your discard pile with 50 HP. You take 30 damage.

cards.name: Almighty Push (Shinra Tensei)
cards.description: Deal 100 damage and switch the Defending Ninja with a Benched one.

cards.name: Amaterasu
cards.description: Deal 120 damage to the Defending Ninja and Burn it.

cards.name: Chibaku Tensei
cards.description: Deal 150 damage to the Defending Ninja.

cards.name: Earth Grudge Fear
cards.description: Steal one Chakra from the Defender and attach it to your Ninja. Deal 80 damage.

cards.name: Izanagi
cards.description: If your Ninja would be KO'd this turn, instead heal it to full HP. Discard 1 Chakra.

cards.name: Izanami
cards.description: The Defending Ninja is Paralyzed until it repeats its last action.

cards.name: Performance of a Hundred Puppets
cards.description: Deal 180 damage to the Defending Ninja. You must have Sasori in play.

cards.name: Six Paths of Pain Summon
cards.description: Put a Pain Path card from your deck into play on your Bench. Shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Tsukuyomi
cards.description: Paralyze the Defending Ninja for 3 turns. You must have an Uchiha Ninja in play.

cards.name: Gedo Mazo Statue
cards.description: Deal 50 damage to all opposing Ninjas. Extract 1 Chakra from each.

cards.name: C4: Karura
cards.description: Deal 200 damage to the Defending Ninja. Discard this card and all your Chakra.

cards.name: Jashin Ritual
cards.description: Deal 80 damage to the Defending Ninja. You also take 40 damage.

cards.name: Kamui Warp
cards.description: Prevent all damage to your Active Ninja this turn. You must have Obito in play.

cards.name: Susanoo
cards.description: Your Active Ninja takes 50 less damage until end of next turn.

cards.name: Thousand Feeding Sharks
cards.description: Deal 140 damage to the Defending Ninja.

cards.name: Totsuka Blade
cards.description: Seal the Defending Ninja — it cannot attack next turn. Deal 60 damage.

cards.name: Yata Mirror
cards.description: Prevent all damage to your Active Ninja this turn.

cards.name: C2: Dragon Bomb
cards.description: Deal 70 damage to the Defender and 20 to each Benched opponent.

cards.name: C3: City Bomb
cards.description: Deal 100 damage to ALL opposing Ninjas.

cards.name: Great Exploding Water Shockwave
cards.description: Deal 80 damage to the Defender and 30 to each Benched opponent.

cards.name: Paper Flower Bomb
cards.description: Deal 60 damage to each opposing Ninja.

cards.name: Preta Path: Chakra Absorb
cards.description: Nullify the next jutsu your opponent uses this turn. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Soul Rip
cards.description: The Defender discards its top 2 Chakra.

cards.name: C1: Explosive Clay Bird
cards.description: Deal 30 damage to any opposing Ninja.

cards.name: Samehada
cards.description: Attach to a Water Ninja. Their attacks absorb 10 HP from the Defender.

cards.name: Scythe of Jashin
cards.description: Attach to Hidan. Attacks ignore the Defender's damage reduction.

cards.name: Hiruko Puppet Shell
cards.description: Attach to Sasori. Reduce damage taken by 30.

cards.name: Itachi's Crow
cards.description: Attach to an Uchiha. Once per battle, escape a KO — heal to 50 HP instead.

cards.name: Rinnegan Pendant
cards.description: The wearer gains access to all Chakra types at cost +1.

cards.name: Konan's Paper Wings
cards.description: The wearer takes no damage from Fire attacks for one turn.

cards.name: Ten Rings of Akatsuki
cards.description: Draw 1 extra card each turn while this is attached.

cards.name: Akatsuki Ring
cards.description: The wearer gains +10 HP per Akatsuki Ninja on your Bench.

cards.name: Akatsuki Cloak
cards.description: The wearer's retreat cost is reduced by 1.

cards.name: Explosive Clay
cards.description: Attach to Deidara. His attacks deal +20 damage.

cards.name: Pain
cards.subtitle: Leader of Akatsuki
cards.description: Discard your hand. Draw 5 cards.

cards.name: Konan
cards.subtitle: Guardian of Amegakure
cards.description: Search your deck for any Jutsu Scroll and add it to your hand.

cards.name: Itachi Uchiha
cards.subtitle: Will of Fire
cards.description: Heal one of your Ninjas to full HP and give it Sage Insight (look at top 3 cards each turn).

cards.name: Kisame Hoshigaki
cards.subtitle: Monster at Your Back
cards.description: Switch your Active Ninja with a Benched Water Ninja. Draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Sasori
cards.subtitle: Art of the Puppeteer
cards.description: Search your deck for any Tool card and attach it to one of your Ninjas.

cards.name: Obito Uchiha
cards.subtitle: The Masked Truth
cards.description: Look at your opponent's hand. Discard 1 card of your choice.
